notes: Configurable public endpoints for provider CSV generation. Multiple enabled sources may share a provider_category and are attempted by fallback_order. Public endpoints can be blocked by network policy/403 responses; local fallback sources are user-supplied external data and must pass freshness validation.

sources.notes: Official TWSE TAIEX OHLC endpoint. A single current-month endpoint may not contain enough history to derive MA60 early in a month; canonical fields are required for full pipeline use.
sources.limitations: Official TWSE TAIEX OHLC endpoint. A single current-month endpoint may not contain enough history to derive MA60 early in a month; canonical fields are required for full pipeline use.

sources.notes: Disabled template. Enable and set path, or pass --price-fallback-csv, to use an externally downloaded/user-supplied canonical price CSV after live TWSE price fetches fail.
sources.limitations: Not real-time production data by itself; operators are responsible for the file source. The fetcher validates as_of and required price fields and does not fabricate missing values.

sources.notes: Disabled template. Enable and set path, or pass --price-fallback-json, to use an externally downloaded/user-supplied canonical price JSON after live TWSE price fetches fail.
sources.limitations: Same validation as CSV fallback; stale or incomplete local rows block required price output.

sources.notes: Configured as optional because TWSE response structure can vary by language/table. Missing mapped fields mark breadth unavailable.
sources.limitations: Configured as optional because TWSE response structure can vary by language/table. Missing mapped fields mark breadth unavailable.

sources.notes: Optional. Endpoint is official TWSE JSON; aggregate/model-specific hedging fields may remain unavailable without a deterministic mapping.
sources.limitations: Optional. Endpoint is official TWSE JSON; aggregate/model-specific hedging fields may remain unavailable without a deterministic mapping.

sources.notes: Optional official TWSE JSON source. Derived 5-day fields require mapped deterministic values; otherwise margin remains unavailable.
sources.limitations: Optional official TWSE JSON source. Derived 5-day fields require mapped deterministic values; otherwise margin remains unavailable.

sources.notes: Optional placeholder for a structured public FX JSON endpoint. No paid API key or broker login is used.
sources.limitations: Optional placeholder for a structured public FX JSON endpoint. No paid API key or broker login is used.

sources.notes: Optional derivatives/futures/options placeholder. If configured endpoint or deterministic mappings are absent, derivatives remain unavailable and no scores are fabricated.
sources.limitations: Optional derivatives/futures/options placeholder. If configured endpoint or deterministic mappings are absent, derivatives remain unavailable and no scores are fabricated.

sources.notes: Optional. Computes count_main_7_below_ma20 only when constituent close and MA20 fields are available for every configured symbol.
sources.limitations: Optional. Computes count_main_7_below_ma20 only when constituent close and MA20 fields are available for every configured symbol.
